chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt:Petition No.D-188 of 2023. _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE _________________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on M.A.No.687/2023. 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.688/2023. 04. For hearing of main case. 28.03.2023 Mr. Habibullah Ghouri, Advocate for the petitioner. = * = * = * = * = * = It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that initially the petitioner was appointed as Junior School Teacher (JST); was awarded scale up- gradation and then was promoted as High School Teacher (HST); such promotion was withdrawn by the respondents without lawful justification, therefore, such action is to be declared illegal with all back benefits to the petitioner. Admittedly, the petitioner is a civil servant; therefore, issue of his promotion, its reversion and withdrawal in terms of Article 212 of Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 could only be adjudicated by Service Tribunal having jurisdiction; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE
